name: chrY_Yp11_32_SRY_region
description: Yp11.2 male-specific region immediately distal to PAR1 boundary, containing SRY (sex-determining region Y) and TSPY1 tandem array. The PAR1/MSY boundary sits at chrY:2.78 Mb (GRCh38). SRY translocation onto chrX via aberrant XY recombination explains the majority of XX male syndrome.

architecture.internal_structure: SRY (single copy), TSPY1 tandem array (~30-60 copies of 20.4 kb at >99% identity), RBMY paralog fragments.

related_diseases: Swyer syndrome (XY gonadal dysgenesis, SRY loss-of-function)
XX male syndrome (SRY translocated to X)
